name: Family Pet Dog Games
description: Step into the exciting world of virtual pet adventures with the Family Pet Dog Simulator! Experience the joy of living with a cute and loyal puppy as you help your virtual family in daily home and neighborhood activities. Play as a lovable family dog and assist virtual mom with cleaning the messy house, completing household chores, and helping neighbours in this fun filled dog simulator game.
instructions: Desktop WASD Movement Left Shift Sprint Ctrl Settings P amp Tab Pause F Action I Instruction Mobile Joystick
